title: wedelia albicaulis
intro: Wedelia albicaulis, also known as the Yellow Flax or Wedelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico and parts of Central and South America. Wedelia albicaulis is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
